prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic full-body portrait of a female pirate captain standing confidently on the wet wooden deck of a 17th-century sailing ship at sea, centered in frame and facing the viewer, with her face deliberately obscured by a soft rectangular blur for anonymity. She has long dark purple-black hair tied in a high messy topknot with loose strands, and wears an ornate layered pirate outfit: a black embroidered long coat with gold trim, fitted dark corset, cream ruffled blouse cuffs, asymmetrical tattered lace skirt, burgundy fabric panels, multiple belts, pouches, buckles, hanging charms, a small pocket watch, thigh-high slit exposing one leg, and tall brown leather gladiator-style boots. She holds one long flintlock pistol angled downward in her right hand. The setting is a dramatic pirate ship deck under bright daylight: blue ocean horizon, white clouds, rigging ropes, sails, mast hardware, wooden railings, coils of rope, barrels, crates, and polished rain-slick planks reflecting sunlight. Include exactly 4 background crew members: 1 crouched or leaning sailor firing a smoking cannon on the left, 1 distant standing sailor near the rigging behind the captain, 1 sailor working ropes beside barrels on the right, and 1 sleeveless crew member partially visible at the far right with a blurred face. Include exactly 1 visible cannon on the left emitting thick white smoke, exactly 2 prominent rope coils on the right, and exactly 2 wooden barrels near the right-middle background. Use ultra-detailed cinematic photorealism, natural sunlight from the upper left, high contrast, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, weathered wood, brass and leather details, sea mist, and an adventurous swashbuckling mood. Square 1:1 composition, full-body subject, low eye-level perspective, no text, no watermark.
